mechanics.excerpt: Prince Victor Steiner- Davion led his forces Strana Mechty; in the heart of Clan space . There , they defeated the Crusader Clans in hard-fought Trial of Refusal. The Crusaders' defeat ended the invasion, leav ing them locked in their occupation zones Or driven trom the Inner Sphere entirely: Clan Nova Cat; which had sided with the Inner Sphere in obedience t0 the mystic visions of its leaders received its Own fiefdom in the Draconis Combine.
